name: mast
description: Clone repos, create per-repo virtualenvs, and install requirements.txt in each.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "if (Test-Path 'C:\MAST\repos') { Get-ChildItem 'C:\MAST\repos' -Directory | ForEach-Object { $py = Join-Path $_.FullName '.venv\Scripts\python.exe'; if (Test-Path $py) { & $py --version } } | Out-File -FilePath (Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs\github-verify.log') -Encoding UTF8; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs\github-smoke.txt') -Value 'github_ok' }"
